date: Tether today announced a transition within its investment leadership. Chief Investment Officer Richard Heathcote, who has played a central role in shaping Tether’s investment strategy during a period of extraordinary growth, will be stepping back from his day-

title: Tether Announces Strategic Investment in Ark Labs, Reintroducing Stablecoins to Programmable Bitcoin Infrastructure
content: Tether Investments today announced a strategic investment in Ark Labs, the team behind Arkade, the programmable Bitcoin infrastructure, to expand global stablecoin access on the largest and most liquid network. This investment was part of a $5.2 million funding round, reinforcing Tether’s integral role and ongoing expansion into the Bitcoin ecosystem.  […]
